name: serena-jetbrains
description: Guide Codex to use a separately configured Serena MCP server with the JetBrains language backend.

interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through IDE-aware navigation, refactoring, inspections, and debugging with a separately configured Serena MCP server and the Serena JetBrains Plugin backend.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Serena safely for this workspace.
Analyze this code with JetBrains symbol tools.
Refactor this safely with Serena's JetBrains backend.
